body:
goodtransgirl:

I feel her hand slide under my shirt to the small of my back, the electric desire of just this simple touch fills me with anticipation of what’s to come. She guides me in front of a full length mirror. “Take it off, but keep your eyes on the mirror.” she tells me gently into my ear, her warm breath distracting. My hands shake as one by one, I watch myself release each button on the fitted top and moment by moment, more of my torso and breasts gradually come into view. When the last button is freed, I let my top drop to the floor quickly, letting my anticipation get the better of me.

As the top hits the floor, she’s still standing behind me, her right hand softly runs from the small of my back up my spine. When it reaches the base of my neck, and she brings her other hand as well and then they part, each hand running softly down one of my now bare arms, leaving goosebumps in their wake. “Take it slow.” she whispers again, in a slightly reprimanding tone, my eyes enthralled with the mirror, watching everything she does to me.

I slide my thumbs into the waistband of my skirt, and ever so slowly slide it down. Bending over in the process, I smirk as I watch the smile in her eyes in the mirror, admiring the ass now bared before her, as the fabric drops around my feet and I then stand back up and step out.

Her hands slide to my waist and once again begin their slow caress over my body. I can feel the heat radiating from her and how her breathing seems to have quickened as I follow her instructions. “Look at yourself!” she whispers. I really look at the way the candlelight makes my skin glow and the look on my face and the parting of my lips when her hands tease certain parts.

She is in no hurry, that’s not how she operates. Instead, she shows me the way she sees me, unwrapped, adored…hers. And when her teeth finally sink into that sweet spot where neck meets shoulder, I audibly moan from the sensation and close my eyes from to savor it more fully.

She quickly releases me and takes a step back. I whimper slightly. She almost growls in response, “Look!” My eyes quickly return to my assigned task, with pink spreading over my face in embarrassment.

“Beautiful” she says in a soft whisper and a few tears are shed, because for once I almost believe her.

Wrapping her arms around me, she once again growls in my ear a single word of which I have no doubt, my face again even brighter pink and it taking all my willpower not to start squeezing my thighs together…the word?

“MINE!!!”
